sections.paragraph:
verb לכפות

to enforce, compel, oblige

verb נכפה

be enforced, compelled

feminine noun

palm; hand

feminine noun

kaph (the 11th letter in Heb. alphabet)

masculine noun

cape, foreland, headland; cliff, rock, promontory

feminine noun

spoon, spoonful; glove

feminine noun

foot (animals) ; sole (foot)
